prompt: convert the photo from daylight to nighttime
remarks: see if the building lights actually turns on
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Transform the bright daylight cityscape into a realistic nighttime scene. The clear blue sky should be replaced with a dark night sky, possibly featuring stars or a moon. All buildings in the city skyline should have their interior and exterior lights illuminated, and streetlights should glow along the waterfront. The water in the foreground should reflect the illuminated city lights, creating a vibrant urban night view.
objects: Clear blue sky (should not be present)
